name: Quinoa Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1/8 cup Finely diced red bell pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the quinoa in a medium saucepan along with the water and 1/8 teaspoon salt. Bring to a simmer and cook, covered, until all the water has evaporated (about 15 minutes). Set aside.
2. Heat the olive oil in a medium saucepan. Saute the celery, fennel, onions, garlic, bell pepper, along with the sea salt for about 5 minutes. Stir occasionally to prevent burning.
3. Add the cooked quinoa and sesame seeds, pinto beans, and tahini to the sauteed vegetables. Blend the ingredients together.
4. Mix the whole wheat flour (stone-ground) and gluten flour together and blend into the vegetable and quinoa mixture.
5. Line a large loaf pan with a baking sheet liner or lightly oil and flour the pan. Press the mixture into the pan.
6. Bake at 400°F for about 45 minutes, until the loaf reaches an internal temperature of 180-200°F. Let the loaf cool, inverted, for 10 minutes before removing it from the pan. Serve the loaf in slices with your favorite tomato (or other) sauce if desired.
